every_item_you_release_is_a_step_toward_: "Every item you release is a step toward freedom. You are stronger than the objects you own."
start_small_and_build_your_courage_step_: Start small and build your courage step by step. This exercise helps you practice letting go of items that your mind tells you are "essential."
you_go_at_your_own_pace_nobody_knows_you: "You go at your own pace. Nobody knows your items better than you do. You are in control."
pick_5_items_that_are_difficult_to_let_g: Pick 5 items that are difficult to let go. We'll arrange them from easiest to hardest to help you build momentum.
start_from_the_bottom_and_work_your_way_: Start from the bottom and work your way up.
take_a_moment_to_find_this_item_hold_it_: Take a moment to find this item. Hold it in your hands and notice how it feels.
focus_on_your_breath_as_you_hold_the_ite: Focus on your breath as you hold the item. You don't have to decide what to do with it yet. Just notice the physical sensations.
observe_the_thoughts_that_arise_without_: "Observe the thoughts that arise without judgment."
before_you_let_go_take_a_moment_to_cente: Before you let go, take a moment to center yourself. Anxiety is high, and that's okay.
im_ready_to_let_it_go: I'm Ready to Let It Go
youve_held_the_item_youve_sat_with_the_f: You've held the item. You've sat with the feeling. Now, choose how you will let it go.
whatever_you_feel_right_now_it_will_pass: "Whatever you feel right now, it will pass. You are doing the hard work."
take_a_moment_to_check_in_with_yourself_: Take a moment to check in with yourself. Notice any changes in your anxiety level.
whatever_you_feel_you_did_it_thats_what_: "Whatever you feel, you did it. That's what matters."
you_faced_the_urge_and_chose_a_different: You faced the urge and chose a different path. Notice the shift in your energy.
every_time_you_do_this_the_urge_loses_a_: Every time you do this, the urge loses a little more of its power. You are retraining your brain to know that you are safe.
each_item_let_go_is_weight_off_your_mind: Each item let go is weight off your mind. You're building a lighter, freer life. Share this tiny victory to inspire others.
every_rung_you_climb_is_proof_of_your_gr: Every rung you climb is proof of your growing strength. Here's where you stand.
